frontmatter.meta: Currently, the world is at a stand still because of Corina Virus. Hundreds of thousands of people died. Many people have lost their jobs. Things are getting tight financially and the outlook is difficult to say the least.
frontmatter.title: The Current Moment, the world has changed, humanity is at a stand still and this is how I feel—right now
